title: kayea assamica
intro: Kayea assamica, also known as the Kayea tree, is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Kayea assamica lie in its roots, which have been traditionally used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Kayea assamica include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Kayea assamica can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat skin conditions.
